mapper.select: SELECT ir.INSPECT_ID AS inspectId, ir.PLANT_CD AS plantCd, ir.INSPECT_NO AS inspectNo, ir.INSPECT_TYPE AS inspectType, ir.INSPECT_DT AS inspectDt, ir.ITEM_CD AS itemCd, ir.LOT_NO AS lotNo, ir.INSPECT_QTY AS inspectQty, ir.SAMPLE_QTY AS sampleQty, ir.PASS_QTY AS passQty, ir.FAIL_QTY AS failQty, ir.INSPECTOR_ID AS inspectorId, ir.WO_ID AS woId, ir.RESULT_ID AS resultId, ir.RECEIVE_ID AS receiveId, ir.VENDOR_CD AS vendorCd, ir.JUDGE_RESULT AS judgeResult, ir.JUDGE_USER_ID AS judgeUserId, ir.JUDGE_DTM AS judgeDtm, ir.PROCESS_CD AS processCd, ir.INSPECT_RMK AS inspectRmk, ir.REG_USER_ID AS regUserId, ir.REG_DTM AS regDtm, id.INSPECT_DTL_ID AS inspectDtlId, id.INSPECT_STD_ID AS inspectStdId, id.SAMPLE_NO AS sampleNo, id.INSPECT_ITEM AS inspectItem, id.DATA_TYPE AS dataType, id.MEASURE_VALUE AS measureValue, id.MEASURE_TEXT AS measureText, id.LSL AS lsl, id.USL AS usl, id.TARGET_VALUE AS targetValue, id.JUDGE_RESULT AS dtlJudgeResult, id.DEFECT_CD AS defectCd, id.DETAIL_RMK AS detailRmk, id.REG_USER_ID AS dtlRegUserId, id.REG_DTM AS dtlRegDtm FROM QC_INSPECT_RESULT ir LEFT JOIN QC_INSPECT_DETAIL id ON ir.INSPECT_ID = id.INSPECT_ID WHERE ir.INSPECT_ID = #{inspectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QC_INSPECT_RESULT ( PLANT_CD, INSPECT_NO, INSPECT_TYPE, INSPECT_DT, ITEM_CD, LOT_NO, INSPECT_QTY, SAMPLE_QTY, PASS_QTY, FAIL_QTY, INSPECTOR_ID, WO_ID, RESULT_ID, RECEIVE_ID, VENDOR_CD, JUDGE_RESULT, JUDGE_USER_ID, JUDGE_DTM, PROCESS_CD, INSPECT_RMK, REG_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{request.plantCd}, #{inspectNo}, #{request.inspectType}, #{request.inspectDt}, #{request.itemCd}, #{request.lotNo}, #{request.inspectQty}, #{request.sampleQty}, #{request.passQty}, #{request.failQty}, #{request.inspectorId}, #{request.woId}, #{request.resultId}, #{request.receiveId}, #{request.vendorCd}, #{request.judgeResult}, #{request.judgeUserId}, #{request.judgeDtm}, #{request.processCd}, #{request.inspectRmk}, #{regUserId} )
